confirmed_issues.description: migration-status.md Phase 1 section header shows 'IN-PROGRESS (Scenario validation passed; 48h continuity window pending)' but the Phase Summary table at the top correctly shows Phase 1 as COMPLETE. The 48h continuity window has been validated and committed (commit 0921023, artifact phase1-bridge-48h-continuity-complete-2026-05-20.md). The section body needs to be updated to reflect PASSED status.
confirmed_issues.root_cause: The Phase 1 section status field was not updated when the 48h continuity gate passed on 2026-05-20.
confirmed_issues.proposed_fix: Update Phase 1 status field in migration-status.md from 'IN-PROGRESS' to 'COMPLETE' and update the 48h continuity gate item to checked.

confirmed_issues.description: npm run lint fails with ERR_MODULE_NOT_FOUND for @eslint/js. npm run build fails with 'vite: not found'. node_modules are not installed in this remote execution environment.
confirmed_issues.root_cause: This is a CI environment limitation — npm install has not been run. The package.json and eslint.config.js are structurally correct; the failure is environment-only.
confirmed_issues.proposed_fix: No code change needed. Run 'npm install' in the deployed environment before running lint/build. check:mql and PHP lint both PASS.

verified_correct.details: All 6 validation gates confirmed: missing token→401, unconfigured key→503, invalid token→403, missing user_id→400, invalid user_id→403, wp_set_current_user called on success. hash_equals() used. All 4 header alias variants checked.

Staleness guard at 300s (422), warn at 120-300s, unparseable timestamp→422, missing bid/ask→400, bid/ask finite+positive+bid≤ask guard, OHLC guard, epoch guard on candle timestamps, future-candle rejection, tick_volume guard via guard_tick_volume(). Canonical candles[] array also accepted via compat layer.
Route uses permission_user (WordPress session). Returns 401 for unauthenticated requests. Correctly NOT public. This is expected behavior documented in the system.
All /admin/* routes use permission_admin which checks is_user_logged_in() + current_user_can('manage_options'). Returns 401 (not logged in) or 403 (logged in but not admin).

age_sec in snapshots comes from broker quote_time/timestamp, not server fetch time. upsert_mt5_snapshot() stores broker timestamp as updated_at. get_cached_price() calculates age from updated_at. Frontend uses backend-provided state field, never computes own age.

is_equity_index_off_session() correctly identifies weekend + non-trading hours using US DST awareness. Off-session equity symbols excluded from feed_has_stale_symbols count in build_health_payload(). Confirmed LIVE at 16:37 UTC 2026-05-15.

Aliases cover: NASDAQ/NASDAQ100/USTECH100/USTECH→NAS100, WALLSTREET/WALLSTREET30/DOW30/DJ30→US30, GOLD→XAUUSD, SILVER→XAGUSD. MT5 SymbolNormalizer.mqh handles broker suffix variants (e.g. EURUSDm, EURUSD.).

ensure_engine_snapshot() generates signals from backend DB data. Signal engine gates on freshness state. Frontend dashboard reads signals from snapshot, does not generate its own. VerdictBadge uses backend verdict directly.
useEngineHealth() has staleTime:0 (Phase 0 BUG-001 fix confirmed in code). Polling only starts when backendReady && pollMs !== null. No race conditions in initialization path.
Watchlist mutations invalidate engine snapshot cache. useWatchlistAdd/Remove use optimistic updates with rollback on error. Backend source of truth for persisted watchlist.

All EA-sent fields (symbol, normalized_symbol, timeframe, timestamp/quote_time, bid, ask, freshness, session, candle.*, candle_m15.*) matched to PHP handler. Both legacy (candle object) and canonical (candles array + tick_volume) formats accepted.
All 5 EA bridge routes operational: /ea/market-stream, /ea/heartbeat, /ea/account-sync, /ea/symbol-sync, /ea/license-check. 48h continuity confirmed 2026-05-20.

migration_blockers.description: Phase 1 section header in migration-status.md still shows IN-PROGRESS
